priest.name: Light Bender
priest.description: Light Benders support allies and become stronger as they heal. (Support, Buffs)

blitz.name: Riftwalker
blitz.description: Riftwalkers bend time and space, becoming stronger as fights drag on. (Mobility, Stack Damage)

arcane.name: Arcanist
arcane.description: Arcanists cause destructive damage and chaos. (Burst Damage, Mana)

Mana Bank ✺ into usable Mana instead of healing.

Channel the power of Orphion and summon

The Sun will summon solar wisps that move

 Total Damage: 300% (of your DPS, per Wisp)

The Thunder Serpent strikes up to

riftwalkerUlt.name: Gravitational Collapse
description: Click Combo: F
Your Dimensional Tear overloads, growing
in size and damage while pulling all enemies in.
While it is overloaded, it deals +400% increased
damage, turns your Teleport into a deadly ray
that fires off 5 times in quick succession,
provides flight, and prevents mana drain.
